facebook.caption:
Tourists walk straight past this shop on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Big mistake.

Long Beach Pearl specializes in Phu Quoc pearl jewelry, one of the island's most legitimate souvenirs. Real cultured pearls, not the airport knockoffs. 4.0 stars across 252 reviews says people who stopped in didn't regret it.

If you're buying pearls anywhere in Phu Quoc, start here first so you know what fair looks like.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Pearls laid out on the counter at Long Beach Pearl. Staff walk you through grades, sizes, real vs. fake. 252 reviews later, this spot on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is still flying under the radar.
